use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and dashboards
Interactive controls in UI components like calendars and modals
State-based interactions with disabled and loading states
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes, built with Radix UI Slot for composition. Features standard hover, focus, and disabled states with subtle shadow effects. Designed for versatile use across SaaS, fintech, and dev-tools applications as a fundamental UI building block.
